audit_items.proof_trace: ExpandRotateKernelInfo calls CloneKernelInfo which can return NULL on memory allocation failure; the NULL is not checked before being passed to RotateKernelInfo and SameKernelInfo, causing NULL pointer dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker can trigger ExpandRotateKernelInfo via crafted kernel input; under memory pressure CloneKernelInfo fails returning NULL, leading to crash.
